panels.raw_text: A dog runs across a field.
panels.expanded_prompt: Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm and approachable color palette. [Dog_001] a medium-sized athletic golden retriever mix with floppy ears, bright round eyes, an open friendly expression, golden-amber fur, a distinctive cream/white chest patch, no collar, fluffy golden tail. The dog is sprinting at full gallop across an open green meadow, ears back, tongue out, eyes bright — pure joyful speed. Wide shot, eye-level angle. Open green meadow in bright daytime with tall grass in the foreground, distant treeline, and clear sky. Bright outdoor natural sunlight, warm golden color temperature. Mood: joyful boundless freedom.
panels.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, deformed legs, extra limbs, distorted anatomy, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, anime, photorealistic, multiple dogs, harsh shadows, oversaturated, cluttered background

panels.expanded_prompt: Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm and approachable color palette — IDENTICAL style to Panel 1. [Dog_001] the SAME medium-sized golden retriever mix with floppy ears, bright round eyes, golden-amber fur, and the SAME distinctive cream/white chest patch as Panel 1, fluffy golden tail. The dog is in a low crouched run, eyes locked on a bouncing yellow tennis ball, ears forward, intense focused gaze, mouth slightly open. Medium shot, dynamic low angle. Same meadow as Panel 1, mid-field — yellow tennis ball in foreground trajectory, grass, open sky. Bright outdoor natural sunlight, same warm golden color temperature as Panel 1. Mood: focused playful determination. Same meadow; continuous chase from Panel 1.

panels.expanded_prompt: Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading, warm and approachable color palette — IDENTICAL style to previous panels. [Dog_001] the SAME medium-sized golden retriever mix with floppy ears, golden-amber fur, and the SAME distinctive cream/white chest patch as Panels 1–2. The dog is trotting toward camera, the SAME yellow tennis ball from Panel 2 held in its mouth, ears up, tail raised and wagging, eyes bright and triumphant. Medium shot, eye-level with the dog approaching the camera. Same meadow as before — same meadow grass, warm afternoon light, open sky. Bright outdoor natural sunlight, same warm golden color temperature as previous panels. Mood: happy triumphant return. Same meadow; the dog is returning from the direction of Panel 2.
